title: Hornet Removal in Wantagh, NY | $350-$550

intro: Dealing with aggressive hornets in Wantagh can pose serious risks to your family, pets, and customers. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout Wantagh and surrounding Long Island communities, ensuring complete nest elimination and prevention. Our licensed technicians use safe, proven methods to protect your property from these dangerous stinging insects.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving Wantagh homeowners and businesses, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with advanced hornet removal techniques. Our team responds quickly to emergency calls, offers competitive pricing between $350-$550, and guarantees complete nest removal with follow-up protection to keep your property hornet-free.
localContext: From the beautiful homes near Wantagh Park and Cedar Creek to the busy commercial corridors along Merrick Road and Sunrise Highway, hornets can nest in eaves, trees, sheds, and overhangs throughout Wantagh. Our technicians are familiar with the unique architecture of Long Island properties, including split-level homes and waterfront residences, ensuring we locate and safely remove all nests while minimizing disruption to your daily routine.

faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Wantagh?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal services in Wantagh typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size and location of the nest, accessibility, and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and upfront quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Wantagh?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most hornet removal requests in Wantagh. Once on-site, our technicians can typically eliminate the nest within 1-2 hours, though larger or hard-to-reach nests may require additional time. We prioritize emergency situations involving children, pets, or high-traffic areas.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our certified technicians use EPA-approved products and professional-grade protective equipment to safely remove hornet nests. We take precautions to protect your family, pets, and landscaping, and provide clear instructions on when it's safe to return to treated areas—typically within a few hours of service completion.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than most wasps and yellow jackets, with bald-faced hornets being common in Wantagh. They build large, paper-like nests in trees and under eaves. While all three can sting multiple times, hornets tend to be more aggressive when defending their nests. Our experts can identify the specific species during inspection and tailor removal methods accordingly.
